steps.t: The Blood-bathed Watcher can be found at the base of Seregost. The Watcher's deep sorrow is causing you to <rgb=#FF00FF>cry</rgb>.
The Blood-bathed Watcher can be found at the base of Seregost. You should talk to the Blood-bathed Watcher again.
The Blood-bathed Watcher can be found at the base of Seregost. The realization that this was the daughter of Lhaereth <rgb=#FF00FF>surprises<…
